mod.name: Drones Plus
mod.description:
Rebalances player bot stations to run on grid power instead of consumable Energy Cells.
Phase 1 — Bot Station Tuning: - Logistic Bot Station, Salvage Bot Station, and Combat Bot Station no longer consume Energy Cells. - In exchange, their continuous electric draw is increased (5 → 8 power/sec). - Tradeoff: keep your generators/batteries on the grid healthy and your bots stay charged forever, no item shuffling.
This is the first slice of a planned drones overhaul. Future phases will expand player-facing drone gameplay.
mod.author: mingc
